data.description:
edit accepts out-of-range/invalid values that create rejects.

Repro:
  rebar edit <id> --priority=99      # accepted, persists 99
  rebar edit <id> --priority=high    # accepted, persists 'high'
  rebar edit <id> --ticket_type=widget  # accepted, persists 'widget'

create rejects all of these. edit must apply the same validation: priority 0-4 integer; ticket_type in {bug,epic,story,task}.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] edit --priority outside 0-4 exits non-zero, no mutation
- [ ] edit --priority non-numeric exits non-zero, no mutation
- [ ] edit --ticket_type not in {bug,epic,story,task} exits non-zero, no mutation
- [ ] valid edits still succeed
data.title: edit does not validate --priority or --ticket_type
